mapper.sql: select f.id, f.material_id, f.department_id, f.upper_limit, f.lower_limit, f.expiry_reminder, f.monitoring, f.location, f.location_id, f.del_flag, f.tenant_id, f.remark, f.delete_by, f.delete_time, f.create_by, f.create_time, f.update_by, f.update_time, d.id as dId, d.name as departmentName, m.id as mId, m.code as materialCode, m.name as materialName, m.speci as specification, m.model as model, m.register_no as registerNo, u.unit_name as unitName, m.price as price, s.name as supplierName, fac.factory_name as factoryName, wc.warehouse_category_name as warehouseCategoryName from dept_fixed_number f left join fd_department d on f.department_id = d.id left join fd_material m on f.material_id = m.id left join fd_unit u on m.unit_id = u.unit_id left join fd_supplier s on m.supplier_id = s.id left join fd_factory fac on m.factory_id = fac.factory_id left join fd_warehouse_category wc on m.storeroom_id = wc.warehouse_category_id where f.del_flag = 0
mapper.insert: insert into dept_fixed_number (id, material_id, department_id, upper_limit, lower_limit, expiry_reminder, monitoring, location, location_id, del_flag, tenant_id, create_by, create_time) values (#{id}, #{materialId}, #{departmentId}, #{upperLimit}, #{lowerLimit}, #{expiryReminder}, #{monitoring}, #{location}, #{locationId}, 0, #{tenantId}, #{createBy}, now())
mapper.update: update dept_fixed_number set upper_limit = #{upperLimit}, lower_limit = #{lowerLimit}, expiry_reminder = #{expiryReminder}, monitoring = #{monitoring}, location = #{location}, location_id = #{locationId}, remark = #{remark}, tenant_id = #{tenantId}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
update dept_fixed_number set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
